docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT NATURAL FLOWER DESIGNS INC. PER PARTIES REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
